examples: The reconstructed mammoth hemoglobin could deliver oxygen at colder temperatures than the human form of the protein could handle.
Hemoglobin, as you know, is an oxygen carrier and so red blood cells concentrate in bags of hemoglobin which circulate in your blood and they carry oxygen.
Sanguinous fluid indicates an excess of red blood cells or hemoglobin.
She notes that hemoglobin levels in CYT387 patients rose in the first few weeks of application.
He sees the average hemoglobin count falling to 9.5 to 10.5 from around 11 today.
